title: prostanthera spinosa
intro: Prostanthera spinosa, also known as the prickly leaved mint bush, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae, native to Western Australia. The leaves and flowers of this plant have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Prostanthera spinosa include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory issues, and providing relief from digestive problems. The plant can be prepared for herbal use through infusions, tinctures, and decoctions, although it's essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
